text:
Each of our watches has its own story. An idea that inspired us to create it. A tradition that we wanted to revive. Or an almost impossible challenge that was successfully overcome. With #AspectsOfTime, we want to shed light on one of these hidden aspects once a month - today: sapphire crystal.

Sapphire crystal not only provides maximum clarity, it also acts as a sort of protective shield for a watch. 

This synthetic crystal, made of aluminium oxide, is almost as hard as a diamond and offers optimum protection for dials and displays. The “silent hero” of the watch industry is a hallmark of high-quality watches and is used in all Glashütte Original models – not only on the front, but on the case back of most timepieces as well. 

For some time now, our 39.5 mm SeaQ has also been among the models featuring a sapphire crystal case back: The classic three-hand model was originally – like its historical predecessor from 1969 – available exclusively with a stainless steel case back. This diving watch is now also available with a sapphire crystal case back, offering a glimpse into the refined mechanics. 

Yet, regardless of which side of your Glashütte Original features this coveted material, ensuring both transparency and protection: its qualities are crystal clear.

#GlashütteOriginal #GlashuetteOriginal #LuxuryWatches #SapphirCrystalBack

A journey into the past: The SeaQ is a modern diver's watch, whose roots stretch far back in time. Its design is inspired by the 1969 Spezimatic RP TS 200, combining this heritage with precision mechanics, contemporary materials, and an exceptionally robust construction.

#GlashütteOriginal #GlashuetteOriginal #SeaQ #DiversWatch #GermanWatches 

Footage by @leppenwatches

What do you look for in a watch: historical authenticity or a crystal-clear view of the inner workings? 

Originally, our SeaQ – like its design inspiration from the 1960s – was available with a solid stainless steel case back. However, this elegant diver’s watch is now also available with a sapphire crystal case back; ideal for anyone who enjoys admiring the mechanics inside. Owners of a SeaQ with a stainless steel case back can, incidentally, have it swapped for the sapphire crystal version on request. 

The only thing we can’t take away from you is the agony of choice!

#GlashütteOriginal #GlashuetteOriginal #SeaQ #DiversWatch #GermanWatch 

Photo credits:
Images 2–4: @leppenwatches

Where there’s a will, there’s a way – this motto holds special significance for Glashütte Original. Again and again, the impossible has been made possible here. Find out more about the remarkable history of our watch manufactory and the people who have shaped it! 

#GlashütteOriginal #GlashuetteOriginal #MindsetMatters #Watchmaker #GermanWatchmaking

A Glashütte Original is so much more than the sum of its parts! Every four weeks, we invite you to #ManufactorySunday and highlight different facets of our watchmaking art.

Today we’re taking a closer look at the Calibre 36. 

This automatic movement was designed from the ground up in-house some years ago. We pulled out all the stops when setting the requirements for this base calibre: it was to not only function reliably, but also deliver the highest precision, a long running time and robustness suitable for everyday use – not to mention looking absolutely stunning. 

To combine all these qualities within the smallest of spaces, our design team came up with some ingenious solutions. 

For the first time at Glashütte Original, a silicon balance spring was used: this high-tech material not only makes the wafer-thin balance spring resistant to magnetic fields and temperature fluctuations, but also allows it to oscillate with exceptional isochronism. To enhance shock resistance, the movement was secured in the case using a bayonet mount, similar to that of a camera lens. Thanks to this and many other ingenious measures, the Calibre 36 has set new standards. 

It is now available in several versions with various complications and powers a new generation of Glashütte Originals with precision, robustness and beauty.

#GlashütteOriginal #GlashuetteOriginal #FineWatchmaking #GermanWatches #WatchMovement

How would we describe the Senator Excellence Panorama Date Moon Phase in a word? Effortless! This watch lends an elegant lightness to complex mechanics and stands out as a confident and stylish companion for life.

#GlashütteOriginal #GlashuetteOriginal #SenatorExcellencePanoramaDateMoonPhase #DressWatch #LuxuryWatches

One watch to rule them all: The Senator Excellence Panorama Date Moon Phase has been designed to be worn every day and for any occasion. It is a small, exquisite mechanical timepiece, with your wrist serving as its most beautiful setting.

#GlashütteOriginal #GlashuetteOriginal #SenatorExcellencePanoramaDateMoonPhase #DressWatch #MechanicalWatches

Whether colourful and sweet or peaceful and hopeful – Easter holds very different meanings for young and old alike. And the traditions vary too: whilst some get up extra early, others are having a lie-in today. 

How fortunate that our Senator Excellence Panorama Date Moon Phase is always wide awake! 

We wish everyone celebrating today a wonderful Easter, with plenty of time for the people and things that matter to them.

#GlashütteOriginal #GlashuetteOriginal #HappyEaster #LuxuryWatches #MechanicalWatches

The concentrated craftsmanship that permeates the Senator Chronometer Tourbillon also defines its appearance. The fusion of traditional watchmaking and technical innovation is reflected in its design, just as it is in its revolutionary in-house calibre. 

Yet however you look at it, this elegant watch is an ode to ingenuity and inventiveness, constantly reminding us never to lose sight of our goal.

#GlashütteOriginal #GlashuetteOriginal #SenatorChronometerTourbillon #HauteHorlogerie #FineWatchmaking

Our Senator Chronometer Tourbillon deserves to be the centre of attention. 

A single glance at its exterior reveals that this watch is a masterpiece of precision engineering. And its name, too, speaks volumes: only an extremely accurate timepiece, whose precision has been tested and certified by an independent body, may officially bear the title ‘Chronometer’. 

Its Flying Tourbillon, meanwhile, is a hallmark of the Glashütte Original manufactory. Here, it has been combined for the first time with a second-stop, reset-to-zero mechanism and minute detent – an innovative tour de force. 

We admit it: one could spend hours raving about the qualities of the Senator Chronometer Tourbillon. Yet its spell is cast in a matter of seconds!

#GlashütteOriginal #GlashuetteOriginal #SenatorChronometerTourbillon #HauteHorlogerie #GermanWatchmakingArt

Historic watches are like time capsules, revealing a great deal about the past. That is why these time-honoured models hold a special place in the heart of our manufactory. 

What story does your watch tell?

#GlashütteOriginal #GlashuetteOriginal #GermanWatchmaking #Craftsmanship #MechanicalWatches

A clean, uncluttered design that is nonetheless anything but ordinary: our PanoReserve successfully blends modernity with tradition. With its meticulous craftsmanship, enduring precision and distinctive design, it embodies contemporary German watchmaking – an art that we perfect day after day with great passion and originality.

#GlashütteOriginal #GlashuetteOriginal #PanoReserve #Understatement #LuxuryWatches
